fixture_path: data/ai_datasets/copydays realistic tiers (ADR-0012 follow-up; generated by evals/ai_fixtures/build_realistic_recompression_tiers.py from real Copydays originals)

distribution.description: 5 deterministic transform profiles (mild recompress, mild resize, moderate resize+recompress, moderate PNG round-trip, messaging-app-style resave) applied to 157 real Copydays original photos
distribution.untested_variation_note: does not cover rotation, cropping, aspect-ratio changes, watermarks/overlays, color/contrast edits, heavier compression than quality=65, or combinations of these — ADR-0012's disclosed margin (threshold 14 vs. the bare-minimum 2 these 5 profiles need) is the mitigation, not a claim these profiles are exhaustive

note: Positives for the PR curve are mild+moderate+messaging_app only (programmatically generated from real Copydays originals) — `hard` (Copydays strong-attack split) is reported separately per-tier above, not blended into the curve used for operating-point selection.
